# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-validation
  namespace: test
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      service: api-gateway-secure
  requirements:
    - providers: [ JWT ]
---
apiVersion: authentication.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: Policy
metadata:
  name: gateway-policy
  namespace: test
  labels:
    app: istio-pilot
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      service: api-gateway-secure
  # Authentication rules are sorted by priority in descending order.
  # For the example, "requestCount" is compared to the total number of requests for each token.
  requestAuthentication:
    # Rule to enforce at most 30 requests per token and each rule has the higher priority than others.
    requirements:
      - key: requestCount
        operator: AT_LEAST
        values: ["30"]
    providers:
      - name: istio-jwt
        config:
          jwtValidationContext:
            caBundle: |-
              -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----
              MIIFczCCA1OgAwIBAgIU4Y/q5VZ96n97G2wP3s7fN0tL8wDQAAAAAA
              ZTAxMC0wOTExMTUxMjEyNDQwMzgxODM3WjAkMCEwCgYIKoZIzj0EAwID

              7dK86rL7O27v4A+H2Pocx5h+7yB/W6gFbqV1+iR0X6uN4oJ4c+mSj
              LfYkGxxE39M3qI8zX38D+a6w==
              -----END CERTIFICATE-----
